---
title: "<i>Macmillan’s Magazine</i>"
---

## <i>Macmillan’s Magazine</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This magazine ran 1859-1907. Two of CMY’s historical novels were serialized in it: <i>The Dove in the Eagle’s Nest</i> (May-December 1865) and <i>The Chaplet of Pearls </i>(November 1867-December 1868), and her series of articles ‘Children’s Literature of the Last Century’ (May-October 1869), 229-37, 302-10, 448-56.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


*... and 10 more*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
